entry_exit.entry: Buy if sentiment spikes positively by >30%, sell/short if sentiment drops negatively by >30%.
entry_exit.exit: Close position when sentiment returns to within ±10% of the 7-day average or after 5 trading days, whichever comes first.

signal_logic.trigger: Calculate daily sentiment score for each ticker from tweets mentioning its ticker symbol or company name. Generate a 7-day moving average of sentiment scores. Signal triggers when daily sentiment changes by more than ±30% compared to the 7-day average.
